overall.description: Aerial drone footage from a flight simulator game showing smooth flight over an arid desert landscape with red rock formations, scattered sandstone boulders, and sparse vegetation. The camera moves steadily across the terrain revealing distant mesas and following a dry riverbed through open prairie.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert terrain with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: flying forward through rocky desert terrain at moderate speed, navigating between large sandstone boulders

entered.detail: large weathered sandstone boulders scattered across the reddish desert floor
sparse dry bushes and small shrubs dotting the arid landscape
flat-topped rock formation visible on the horizon
singular tall rock pinnacle rising from the desert floor

segments.scene_description: Flying through a rocky desert landscape with large sandstone boulders scattered across the reddish terrain. Sparse desert bushes dot the ground while distant mesas rise on the horizon under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie transitioning from rocky area

events.description: exits rocky boulder field into open desert prairie with visible dry wash
camera banks slightly left while passing the large mesa formation

agents.ego_description: flying over open prairie while passing a large mesa formation on the left, following the terrain contours

entered.detail: massive flat-topped mesa with steep cliffs passing by on the left side
sandy dry riverbed or wash cutting through the prairie terrain

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the rocky boulder field into open prairie, passing a massive tabletop mesa on the left. A dry wash becomes visible cutting through the terrain ahead as the camera continues its forward flight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert prairie with dry wash

agents.ego_description: flying steadily over open prairie following the path of a dry riverbed, maintaining consistent altitude

segments.scene_description: Flying over expansive open prairie following the winding path of a dry wash. The terrain stretches to the distant horizon with only sparse vegetation and the dry riverbed providing visual features in the vast arid landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial flight that transitions from a boulder-strewn desert into a vast, open prairie. It begins by gliding through a rocky landscape of scattered sandstone boulders and sparse bushes, with distant mesas rising under a partly cloudy sky. As the camera moves forward, the rocky terrain gives way to open prairie, passing a massive tabletop mesa on the left. The scene then shifts to follow the winding path of a dry wash that cuts through the earth, guiding the camera across the expansive arid plains. Finally, the view opens up to the distant horizon, where the dry riverbed remains the primary feature of the wide, desolate landscape.
